domains.allowed_storage: in-memory query cache only; optional persistent cache only for route-safe replay and never as legal truth
domains.forbidden_misuse: Do not derive new legal posture in the client or persist these projections as durable truth.
domains.purpose: Hydrated route-level read models, receipt follow-up, and stream-backed query state.

domains.allowed_storage: URL, history.state, and tiny session-bound restore records only
domains.forbidden_misuse: Do not hide continuity state behind local component-only memory when the route contract requires cross-refresh restore.
purge_or_invalidation_triggers: browser handoff returns with incompatible route context
domains.purpose: Route ownership, shell stability, focus restoration, return targets, and rebase posture that preserve same-object continuity.

domains.allowed_storage: memory first; session-bound browser storage only when the contract publishes draft-resume semantics
domains.authoritative_owner: deployable-local feature modules with packages/state-runtime guards
domains.forbidden_misuse: Do not silently replay drafts after a stale-view rejection or scope downgrade without explicit user-visible rebasing.
domains.purpose: Unsubmitted route-local drafts, upload selections, approval acknowledgements, and governance change-basket work.

domains.forbidden_misuse: Do not encode business truth, customer-safe visibility, or settlement semantics here.
domains.purpose: Purely presentational state such as drawer openness, filter chips, tab focus, viewport density, and transient highlights.

domains.allowed_storage: httpOnly cookies and server-side session state; no raw tokens in browser-managed JavaScript storage
domains.authoritative_owner: server session boundary plus packages/northbound-clients handoff runtime
domains.forbidden_misuse: Do not collapse operator and portal sessions into one mega-app ambient login state.
domains.purpose: Browser-authenticated session envelopes, anti-CSRF state, and browser handoff return metadata for each deployable.

domains.allowed_storage: session-bound storage or IndexedDB only for transfer/resume metadata that the route contract explicitly allows
domains.forbidden_misuse: Do not store raw authority credentials, legal truth, hidden staff context, or customer-safe widened caches here.
domains.purpose: Route-safe upload-session descriptors, preview/download intents, and limited cached transfer metadata.
